_comment: Shared cross-platform sample of the SCBK1 synced settings singleton (docs/SCBK1_Format.md §5/§6). Byte-identical in the iOS (MyInventory) and Android (supplies-check) repos. Android backup.test.ts and iOS SettingsSyncTests both parse this to prove identical decode + whole-object last-write-wins. `defaultIntervalValue` null would mean 'no default'; here it is set to 3 years to exercise a non-default value.
